title: Insane Bedwars
description: This is bedwars Resources Pack for 1.8 pvpers
body:
*A Bedwars resource pack is a special Minecraft texture pack made for the Bedwars game mode that only changes the look of items, blocks and the game interface to make PvP clearer and easier, such as shorter and cleaner swords, brighter and simpler textures for resources like iron, gold, diamonds and emeralds, clearer team-colored wool and common Bedwars blocks like end stone and obsidian, a redesigned bed texture, cleaner GUI and crosshair, and lower fire and visual effects, so players can see better during fast fights and often get smoother performance, which is especially helpful for mobile players using PojavLauncher like you.

*

```
CHECK THIS OUT FAST !!
```
